yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_July_2026_Patch_Tuesday_Microsoft_Patche {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for July 2026 Patch Tuesday: Microsoft Patches 622 Vulnerabilities Including Two Exp"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-17"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Browser_Security_ZeroDays_Are_Only_Part_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Browser Security: Zero-Days Are Only Part of the Problem"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-17"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:

}

        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-17"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "SharePoint" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CISA Adds Exploited SharePoint RCE Zero-Day CVE-2026-58644 t"; content:"CVE-2026-58644"; nocase; sid:5047188; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 36 threat advisories. Of these, 1 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 12 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires heightened vigilance with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
